title: The RealReal (REAL) Q4 2025 Earnings Transcript
text: The RealReal Q4 2025 earnings summary shows Q4 GMV of $616 million (22% growth), Q4 revenue of $194 million (18% growth), full-year GMV of $2.13 billion (16% growth), full-year revenue of $693 million (15% growth). Q4 adjusted EBITDA of $22 million (11.3% margin), full-year adjusted EBITDA of $42 million (6.1% margin), Q4 free cash flow of $43 million. Customer engagement metrics: active buyers grew 9% (trailing twelve months), orders increased 10% year-over-year, average order value rose 11%. Athena AI system processed 35% of fulfillment units by year-end. Gross margin expanded to 74.8% (up 40 basis points). Direct channel gross margin reached 26% (up 1,200+ basis points). 2026 guidance projects GMV growth of 12%-15%, revenue growth of 10%-13%, with adjusted EBITDA reaching approximately 8% margin at the midpoint, representing nearly 200 basis points expansion. Strategic focus areas: growth through sales team productivity (54% with 2+ years tenure), operational excellence via AI investments, and enhanced customer experience through MyCloset and AI-powered discovery tools.
